title: Implement WakeTask's loud alarm sound lab feature pack after viral completion/accountability lands

goal.value: Implement WakeTask's loud alarm sound lab feature pack after viral completion/accountability lands

inputs.feature_goal: Make WakeTask's alarms feel impossible to miss without becoming hard to configure: loud sound packs, ramping intensity, randomized alarm rotation, haptic reinforcement, preview controls, and safety fallbacks grounded in the existing alarm flow.
inputs.target_audience: Heavy sleepers and consumer iPhone users who need forced engagement and loud, reliable alarm pressure to wake up

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl gh git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck sqlite3 unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.141 @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

spec.graph_source:
digraph IterateExistingAppFeatures {
    graph [
        goal="Implement a product feature iteration in an existing iPhone app with context-driven specs, real behavior changes, validation evidence, and postmortem learning",
        persona="existing-iphone-app-feature-orchestrator",
        inputs="repo_url,base_branch,run_branch,app_name,bundle_id,app_dir,app_domain,target_audience,feature_goal,required_capabilities,context_paths,max_competitors,use_mobbin_mcp,use_design_corpus,ios_validation_mode,allow_macos_deferred,fabro_server",
        outputs="context_pack,research_pack,existing_app_audit,feature_spec,implementation_plan,implementation_evidence,validation_report,publish_handoff,postmortem",
        artifact_root=".workflow/existing-app-feature",
        secret_policy="no secrets; credential checks are presence-only; do not print environment variables or credential values",
        default_max_retries=2,
        retry_target="feature_spec_child",
        model_stylesheet="
            *       { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex-spark; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .spec   { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .build  { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .review { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
        "
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    feature_workflow_preflight [
        label="Feature Workflow Preflight",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./feature-workflow-preflight-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=120,
        manager.poll_interval="1s"
    ]

    context_intake_child [
        label="Context Intake Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./feature-context-intake-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=180,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    research_child [
        label="Research Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./feature-research-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=240,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    existing_app_audit_child [
        label="Existing App Audit Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./feature-existing-app-audit-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=240,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    feature_spec_child [
        label="Feature Spec Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./feature-spec-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=240,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    implementation_plan_child [
        label="Implementation Plan Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./feature-implementation-plan-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=240,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    implementation_child [
        label="Implementation Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./feature-implementation-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=1000,
        manager.poll_interval="10s"
    ]

    validation_child [
        label="Validation Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./feature-validation-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=360,
        manager.poll_interval="5s"
    ]

    publish_postmortem_child [
        label="Publish And Postmortem Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./feature-publish-postmortem-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=240,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    start -> feature_workflow_preflight
    feature_workflow_preflight -> context_intake_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    feature_workflow_preflight -> feature_workflow_preflight [label="Fix Workflow/Environment"]
    context_intake_child -> research_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    context_intake_child -> context_intake_child [label="Fix Context"]
    research_child -> existing_app_audit_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    research_child -> context_intake_child [label="Research Context Fix"]
    existing_app_audit_child -> feature_spec_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    existing_app_audit_child -> context_intake_child [label="Audit Context Fix"]
    feature_spec_child -> implementation_plan_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    feature_spec_child -> feature_spec_child [label="Fix Feature Spec"]
    implementation_plan_child -> implementation_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implementation_plan_child -> feature_spec_child [label="Fix Mapping"]
    implementation_child -> validation_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    implementation_child -> implementation_child [label="Fix Implementation"]
    validation_child -> publish_postmortem_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    validation_child -> implementation_child [label="Fix Validation Failures"]
    publish_postmortem_child -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    publish_postmortem_child -> publish_postmortem_child [label="Complete Handoff/Postmortem"]
}
